top_findings.summary: This AWS EventBridge Rule Creator skill requests permission to run any AWS CLI command (Bash(aws:*)) with full access to all AWS services. While EventBridge rule creation might require some AWS interactions, granting blanket access to ALL AWS commands (including potentially destructive operations like deleting databases, modifying security groups, or accessing sensitive data) is excessive for the stated purpose of providing "step-by-step guidance" and "best practices." The skill should be scoped to specific, relevant AWS commands.
